# hindclaw_service_account (Resource)

Manages a Hindclaw service account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hindclaw_service_account" "ci_bot" {
  id                = "ci-bot"
  owner_user_id     = "alice"
  display_name      = "CI Bot"
  scoping_policy_id = hindclaw_policy.ci_readonly.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String) Display name.
- `id` (String) Service account identifier. Immutable after creation.
- `owner_user_id` (String) Owner user identifier. Immutable after creation.

### Optional

- `scoping_policy_id` (String) Scoping policy identifier. Null means full parent inheritance.

### Read-Only

- `is_active` (Boolean) Whether the service account is active (read from server).
